nodes.name: Get posts index
nodes.notes: Public raw JSON — no GitHub credential. Replaces GitHub get (was passing scheduler input through on failure).

options.systemMessage: You are an expert medical SEO writer for Prof. Giv Sharifi, neurosurgeon in Dubai and Tehran. Return one valid JSON object matching the requested shape. Write FULL prose paragraphs — never bullet-point outlines disguised as headings. Simple B2 English. Never use Persian. Never add level:0 or level on non-heading blocks. If you cannot reach 1000 words, add more paragraph blocks before returning JSON.

nodes.name: Parse & sanitize JSON
nodes.notes: Fixes level:0 on paragraphs, broken CTA href/text, markdown-wrapped JSON. No structured parser needed.

nodes.name: Generate an image
nodes.notes: OpenAI credential. Outputs binary property data (filesystem mode).

nodes.name: Save draft JSON GitHub
nodes.notes: On re-run change operation to edit if file exists

nodes.name: Send preview photo
nodes.notes: Wire binary from image — map in n8n UI: binary property from previous HTTP node converted to file

parameters.content:
## Draft + preview
Gemini → Parse & sanitize JSON → Normalize → OpenAI image → Telegram preview
No structured parser — Code node fixes level:0, broken CTAs, fenced JSON.
